name: leyline
description: Opinionated developer-session workflow plugin. Encodes a deterministic pipeline from first message to merged branch as skills that hand off to each other in a fixed order.

interface.shortDescription: Deterministic development workflow skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Leyline packages a behavior-shaping skill library for discovery, planning, debugging, execution, review, and verification in Codex.
defaultPrompt: Use Leyline to plan a new feature from discovery through execution.
Use Leyline to debug a failure with systematic root-cause investigation.
